name: Banana Pancakes
servings: serves 8 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 20-25 minutes
method: In a large mixing bowl, combine the egg, mashed banana, butter, vanilla extract, and milk.
Stir in the flour, baking powder, baking soda, ground cinnamon, and salt.
Stir in the maple extract and mix until just combined. Be careful not to overmix the batter.
Heat a large nonstick frying pan over medium heat. Spray it with cooking spray to lightly coat the surface.
Working in batches, pan-fry the pancakes for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Serve with banana slices and a drizzle of maple syrup if desired.
